content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong global risk-on (Nasdaq +2%, S&P +1.46%) feeding into broad-based domestic gap-up across pharma, auto, capital goods, defence, FMCG and chemicals. Most of my held names are showing 1-10% green opens — this is a trail-SL day, not a chase-new-entries day. Cumulative P&L is -53.7% so capital preservation and locking in unrealized gains dominate the agenda. CAMS had reported earnings (Q4 already out May 4-5), CAMS surge today is post-result follow-through — held position is in good shape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Existing SL 1030 is already above entry (locked in ~+4.7%) and sits ~2.5% below CMP, which respects the 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 thesis intact: GNPA <1%, +18% PAT, +36% disbursements; sector NBFC tailwind from rate-cut narrative. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — keeping SL/target unchanged via HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 (-3.3% from entry) intact. Gold ETF as portfolio hedge despite risk-on day; INR weakness supports floor. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Existing SL 1720 already locked above entry at +1.2%, which respects the 1% trail-gap floor (CMP-SL gap = 2.1%). Q4 PAT +9%, revenue +26%, ATH yesterday 1757.40. Promoter stake sale is an overhang but Capital Group buyer is institutional validation. Holding with breakeven-plus locked SL — no-op MODIFY skipped, this is HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4530.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Existing SL 4530 only -1.0% from entry. Per trailing mandate (a), at +2% I'd move SL to breakeven — currently +1.2% so just shy of trigger. Position barely above entry, defence sector at 7-mo high but profit-booking risk after +31% April rally. Keeping current SL — HOLD effectively (no MODIFY emitted to avoid no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Existing SL is already AT entry (6900 = breakeven). Per trailing mandate (a), SL is satisfied. Q4 EBITDA +80%, margin +875bps, PAT +124%. Specialty chem theme running with SRF +6.85%. CMP-SL gap is 2.1% which respects 1% floor. HOLD effectively — no-op skipped."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86% on a +9.84% gap-up day. Tightening SL from 820 (entry-2.1%) up to 838 (breakeven) is permissible per monotonic-up trailing rule. CMP-SL gap = 0.86% — that's BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor; risks self-stopout. Reverting: leave SL at 820 to preserve absorption budget. HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08% (flat). CMP at 52-week high 369.30 area on +6.6% intraday move. SL 358 at -3% from entry. Q4 results (May 4) showed ROA +63bps, asset quality improving. NBFC tailwind from ECLGS. Wait for sustained close above 369 before trailing SL up — currently just kissing the high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. SL 805 (-1.8% from entry). Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22%, ATH today, Motilal target Rs 950. CMP-SL gap to breakeven (820) would be only 0.3% — below 1% trail-gap floor → cannot trail up yet. Keep SL at 805. HOLD effectively, no-op MODIFY skipped."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6% on a +11% upper-circuit day post-Q4 beat (PAT +124%, revenue +30%, $1.75B order book). Per trail mandate (a), at +2% trigger SL should move to breakeven — we're at +1.6%, just shy. CMP-SL gap currently 2.7% (1245 vs 1279), respects 1% floor. Existing SL adequate; if move sustains to +2-3%, next tick trail up. HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2960.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3% on a +9.2% gap-up day. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA +61%, FY26 PAT +42%. SL 2960 at -2.1% from entry. Trail to entry (3025) would create CMP-SL gap of just 0.3% — violates 1% floor. Keep SL at 2960. HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 788.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16% on +10.5% gap-up post-Q4 (record EBITDA margin 46.5%). SL 788 at -2.2% from entry. Trail to breakeven (806) would create CMP-SL gap 0.16% — well below 1% floor; high self-stopout risk. Keep SL at 788. HOLD effectively."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "SL 1030 already locked above entry +4.7%. Thesis intact. CMP-SL gap 2.5% safe."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Hedge position, slight loss, SL intact."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1720.00, "reasoning": "SL 1720 already above entry +1.2%, locked profit. CMP-SL gap 2.1% respects 1% floor."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4530.00, "reasoning": "Just +1.2% — below +2% trail trigger. SL 4530 at -1% adequate."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6900.00, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (6900 = entry). CMP-SL gap 2.1% safe. Thesis strong on Q4 beat."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "Trailing to breakeven 838 would give CMP-SL gap of only 0.86% — breaches 1% trail floor. Keep SL 820 to preserve absorption budget on gap-up day."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 358.00, "reasoning": "Flat vs entry. At 52-week high. Wait for sustained breakout before trailing."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 805.00, "reasoning": "Only +0.3% — trail to breakeven would breach 1% gap floor. SL 805 at -1.8% intact."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1245.00, "reasoning": "+1.6% just shy of +2% trail trigger. Existing SL 1245 with 2.7% CMP gap is adequate. Re-evaluate next tick if move sustains."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2960.00, "reasoning": "+0.3% on big gap-up. Trail to entry breaches 1% gap floor. SL 2960 at -2.1% intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 788.00, "reasoning": "+0.16% on gap-up. Trail to breakeven breaches 1% gap floor. SL 788 intact."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M (auto, +5.7% post Q4 +48% PAT), BHARATFORG (Q4 today, event-trade rules), CHOLAHLDNG (results May 8 — 1 session away, NO-ACTION on entry per binary-event rule), GABRIEL (results May 13), LUPIN/AUROPHARMA/BIOCON/DABUR/BSE all reporting today — all blocked by binary-event NEW-entry rule unless event-trade sized ≤5% with conf ≥0.70, and I'm avoiding stacking event-trades. HFCL pending BUY @133.50 already OPEN — no action.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is all-green or flat on a strong gap-up; cumulative experiment P&L -53.7% means capital preservation dominates. The decisive call today is: don't add risk into a 1-session gap-up filled with same-day earnings binaries. Trail-SL discipline is constrained by the 1% gap-floor rule on most names since they've barely moved past entry — patience to next tick. HFCL pending order: leaving as-is. No new entries this tick. Cancel review of HFCL pending will happen next tick if it remains stale (placed 1738m ago = ~29h, likely from prior session — needs cancel-or-modify decision soon, but with limited LTP data this tick I'll defer to next call). Deployed capital is currently meaningful (11 positions); soft 80% target in range. No fresh exposure justified on a gap-up earnings-heavy day."
}
